name: Chicken
examineText: A wary chicken pecking at whatever the ground is willing to give up.

name: Rooster
examineText: A proud rooster, strutting like dawn itself reports to him.

name: Cow
examineText: A gentle cow with the calm confidence of something that has never paid rent.

name: Bull
examineText: A heavy bull with a short temper and no interest in negotiation.

name: Bear
examineText: A broad-shouldered bear. The sensible part of you suggests distance.

name: Black Bear
examineText: A black bear with watchful eyes and the patience to wait you out.

name: Bear Cub
examineText: A young bear cub, curious enough to be worrying.

name: Giant Rat
examineText: A rat grown far beyond anyone's comfort.

name: Goblin
examineText: A goblin with more nerve than plan.

name: Wolf
examineText: A lean wolf watching for the smallest mistake.

name: Skeleton
examineText: Still standing, which feels frankly unnecessary.

name: Spider
examineText: A spider skittering with too many legs and too much confidence.

name: Black Spider
examineText: A black spider with a glossy shell and a very convincing glare.

name: Mother Spider
examineText: The matriarch of the nest. Everything about her says not today.

name: Guard
examineText: A town guard trying very hard to look like this is under control.

name: Shopkeeper
examineText: Smiling with the exact warmth of a refund policy.

name: Dark Knight
examineText: A dark knight wrapped in armour and bad intentions.

name: Weapon Smith
examineText: A weapon smith with hands that know every edge in the room.

name: Armorer
examineText: An armorer sizing up dents before they happen.

name: Leg Armorer
examineText: A specialist in leg armour, which suddenly feels more important.

name: Shield Smith
examineText: A shield smith who believes every problem can be blocked eventually.

name: Camel
examineText: A camel chewing thoughtfully, as if judging the whole kingdom.

name: Banker
examineText: A banker protected by ledgers, locks, and professional patience.

name: Snow Wolf
examineText: A snow wolf with pale fur and colder instincts.

name: Rat
examineText: A small rat. It still looks too comfortable here.

name: New Friendly NPC
examineText: A friendly face still waiting for a better job title.

name: Farmer
examineText: A farmer with soil on his boots and weather in his bones.

name: Bill the Stylist
examineText: A man who can see your split ends from three tiles away.

name: Vampire
examineText: A vampire wearing charm like a second cloak.

name: Elder Vampire
examineText: An elder vampire who has outlived both mercy and fashion.

name: Custom Humanoid
examineText: A custom-built stranger with a look that says someone is still editing.

name: Castle Prisoner
examineText: A prisoner counting stones, footsteps, and chances.

name: Skeleton Warrior
examineText: A skeleton warrior gripping old steel with borrowed purpose.

name: Skeleton Warrior
examineText: A skeleton warrior standing guard long after the orders stopped making sense.

name: Skeleton Warrior
examineText: A skeleton warrior with a cracked helm and tireless patience.

name: Sultan's Royal Guard
examineText: A royal guard watching the Sultan's ore tally with more interest than the miners.

name: Ali the Oasis-Born
examineText: A dignified camel who looks insulted by the word livestock.

name: Palace Guard
examineText: A custom-built stranger with a look that says someone is still editing.

name: Scimitar shop
examineText: Smiling with the exact warmth of a refund policy.

name: Bandit
examineText: A masked outlaw looking for an easy mark.

name: Helmet Smith
examineText: A helmet smith with rows of full helms ready for fitting.

name: Food Stall Merchant
examineText: A merchant watching over the food stall.

name: Crafting Stall Merchant
examineText: A merchant watching over the crafting stall.

name: Hides Stall Merchant
examineText: A merchant watching over the hides stall.

name: Ranging Stall Merchant
examineText: A merchant watching over the ranging stall.

name: Low Level Smithing Stall Merchant
examineText: A merchant watching over the low level smithing stall.

name: High Level Smithing Stall Merchant
examineText: A merchant watching over the high level smithing stall.

name: Relic Stall Merchant
examineText: A merchant watching over the relic stall.

name: Gem Stall Merchant
examineText: A merchant watching over the gem stall.
